name: get_fundamentals
description: Fetch key fundamental financial metrics for a stock including P/E, P/B, D/E ratios, ROE, free cash flow yield, earnings date, revenue, and net income.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL).

name: get_price_history
description: Fetch historical OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) price data for a stock ticker over a specified time period.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL).

period.description: The time period for historical data. Valid values: 1d, 5d, 1mo, 3mo, 6mo, 1y, 2y, 5y, 10y, ytd, max. Defaults to 1y.

name: get_sector_medians
description: Get median financial ratios (P/E, P/B, D/E, ROE) for a given market sector. Useful for comparing individual stock metrics against sector benchmarks.

sector.description: The market sector name (e.g. Technology, Healthcare, Financial Services, Energy, Utilities, Consumer Cyclical, Consumer Defensive, Industrials, Real Estate, Basic Materials, Communication Services).
